MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - ATTY. BRIAN LARSEN'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF EARLINE WILLIAMS is Off calendar. A substitution of attorneys was filed January 10, 2012. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
